seo.title: About AmusementPark — Explore amusement parks differently
seo.description: Discover AmusementPark, a visual guide to explore amusement parks, rides, images, maps and visit ideas around the world.

aboutPage.title: Explore amusement parks differently
aboutPage.lead: AmusementPark is a discovery guide built to help you explore amusement parks, their worlds, attractions and experiences. Whether you are planning a family day out, a future trip or simply enjoy discovering new parks, the site brings the essential information together in a clear, visual and enjoyable interface.

heroVisual.parksHint: A starting point to discover new destinations.

stats.parksHint: An international base that grows progressively.
stats.contentHint: Pages designed to quickly understand what each park offers.
stats.languagesHint: Making discovery more accessible to visitors around the world.

promise.title: Helping you choose, compare and dream more easily
promise.subtitle: An amusement park is more than an address or a list of rides. It is an atmosphere, themed areas, experiences, shows, restaurants, images, a location and sometimes a true travel destination. AmusementPark brings this together in pages that are simple to read and easy to explore.

discover.title: Find parks that make you want to go
discover.text: Browse parks in different countries, discover their location, general atmosphere and the places and experiences they contain. The goal is to quickly give you a first impression: family park, major destination park, regional park, water park, highly themed place or local day out.

understand.title: See what there is to do on site
understand.text: Each page can bring together available attractions, restaurants, shops, shows, areas and images. You can better understand a park before going into details or comparing it with other destinations.

prepare.title: Plan a visit or inspire your next trip
prepare.text: AmusementPark is not just a list of places: it is a starting point to imagine a day out, spot parks near a destination, explore images, open the map and gradually build your own selection of parks to discover.

explore.title: One page for each park, several ways to discover it
explore.subtitle: The site pages are designed to move from simple to detailed: first understand the park, then explore its attractions, areas, images or map when those details are available.

parkPages.title: Read a clear park overview
parkPages.text: Each park page highlights useful information: name, location, description, status, types of experiences and links to more detailed content.

items.title: Explore park attractions and places
items.text: When data is available, you can browse attractions, restaurants, shops, shows or other points of interest linked to the park.

images.title: Discover the park through images
images.text: Images help you feel the atmosphere of a park, area or attraction, turning a simple description into a more visual discovery.

map.title: Locate parks and their places
map.text: The map helps you understand where a park is, what surrounds it, and eventually where the different experiences are located inside the site.

nearby.title: Spot other parks around a destination
nearby.text: When viewing a park, nearby parks can help you broaden your search and imagine a more complete itinerary.

languages.title: Explore in your language
languages.text: The site is designed to be browsed in several languages so information is more accessible, whether you are a local visitor, tourist or enthusiast.

audiences.title: Whether you are planning a visit or simply love parks

families.title: For families
families.text: More easily spot parks that may suit a day with children, a relaxed outing or a progressive discovery.

fans.title: For park enthusiasts
fans.text: Explore attractions, areas, manufacturers, images and details that help understand a park’s identity.

travelers.title: For travelers
travelers.text: Plan a stop around a park, compare several destinations and spot interesting places around a city or region.

curious.title: For curious visitors
curious.text: Discover parks you may never have heard of, explore their universe and be surprised by the diversity of destinations.

approach.title: Useful, readable information enriched with care
approach.text: AmusementPark aims to present parks clearly and pleasantly, without drowning visitors in raw data. Information is organized to be quickly understandable: where the park is, what you can find there, what makes it interesting and which content helps you go further.

structured.title: Structured data
structured.text: Parks, attractions, images, areas and references are organized to support coherent navigation and easy-to-browse pages.

progressive.title: A base that improves over time
progressive.text: Information can be completed, corrected and enriched progressively to make pages more and more useful.

visitor.title: A visitor-first presentation
visitor.text: The goal is not to display everything at once, but to guide visitors toward the right level of detail: summary, attractions, map, images or specialized pages.

clarity.title: A focus on clarity
clarity.text: When information is missing or incomplete, the page should remain understandable and avoid giving a false sense of certainty.

future.title: A discovery companion for park lovers
future.text: AmusementPark is meant to become a more and more practical tool to explore, compare and prepare visits. The goal is to progressively offer richer pages, more useful maps, better organized galleries, more precise filters and tools that help everyone find the park that best matches their wishes.

items.filters: Better filter available attractions and experiences.
items.images: Explore images by date, place or content type.
items.map: Visualize more information on the map.
items.trips: Help prepare outing or trip ideas around parks.

finalCta.title: Ready to start exploring?
finalCta.text: Choose a park, open its page, discover its attractions, images or map, and let yourself be guided toward your next destination.

contactPage.title: Contact AmusementPark
contactPage.lead: Send a note about the site, a missing detail, a data issue or an idea to improve the experience.

email.title: Direct contact
email.note: This address is temporary until a dedicated mail provider is configured.

form.title: Leave a message
form.description: Messages are stored as plain text and reviewed from the admin panel.
form.help: Plain text only. HTML tags and abusive links are rejected.
form.validation: Enter a plain text message between 10 and 2000 characters.
form.error: The message could not be sent. Check the text or try again later.

privacy.title: Anti-abuse notice
privacy.text: This form is intentionally strict to protect the site and its administrators.

points.plainText: Messages are accepted as plain text only.
points.ip: Your IP address is recorded to limit repeated abuse.
points.admin: Only administrators can consult submitted messages and technical context.

cookieConsent.title: Cookies and privacy
cookieConsent.text: AmusementPark uses cookies or storage necessary for site operation, especially security, session, language, theme and authentication. With your consent, the site also activates optional audience-measurement cookies for Matomo and Microsoft Clarity.

brand.tagline: The complete map of thrills. Park by park, attraction by attraction.

bottom.copy: © {{year}} AmusementPark — Made with heart and adrenaline

privacyPage.title: Privacy policy
privacyPage.lead: This page explains how AmusementPark processes personal data, necessary cookies, Google OAuth authentication, Matomo audience measurement and Microsoft Clarity usage analytics.

consent.title: Manage optional cookies
consent.text: Cookies that are necessary for operation and authentication may be used without consent. Here you can accept, refuse or show again the choice for optional audience-measurement and usage-analytics cookies.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body1: The data controller is Cédric Caudron, publisher of the AmusementPark website.
controller.body2: For any personal-data request, you can use the contact methods published on cedric-caudron.com.

data.title: Processed data
data.body1: The website may process account data needed for the service: email address, provided first or last name, avatar, preferred language and profile settings.
data.body2: Technical data may also be processed: IP address, date, viewed URL, browser, error logs and security information strictly useful for operation.

purposes.title: Purposes and legal bases
purposes.body1: Data is used to provide website features, secure access, manage accounts, display public content and administer the project.
purposes.body2: Processing required for operation relies on service performance or legitimate interest. Optional Matomo and Microsoft Clarity audience-measurement cookies rely on your consent unless a strictly exempt configuration is later implemented.

analytics.title: Matomo audience measurement
analytics.body1: The website uses a self-hosted Matomo instance available at matomo.cedric-caudron.com with site ID 4.
analytics.body2: Matomo may measure visited pages, navigation sequences, traffic sources, device type and technical browser information.
analytics.body3: No third-party advertising tracking is added by this integration. Profile-related journeys may be measured only after optional-cookie consent, without sending private profile content as analytics events.

cookies.title: Cookies and local storage
cookies.body1: Strictly necessary cookies or storage may be used for session, security, language, theme, interface preferences and proper authentication behavior.
cookies.body2: These necessary trackers may include session/API cookies, HTTP-only authentication cookies, anti-abuse mechanisms and locally stored preferences. They cannot be disabled from the banner because they condition the requested service.
cookies.body3: The optional-cookie choice is stored in browser local storage and in a preference cookie so the same choice is not requested on every page.

hosting.title: Hosting and processors
hosting.body1: The website is intended to be hosted on a server located in France via Hostinger. Project technical services, including MongoDB, MinIO and Matomo, may run on this VPS.
hosting.body2: Data is not sold to advertisers. It may be processed by technical providers strictly required for hosting, security and operation.

retention.title: Retention periods
retention.body1: Accounts are kept while the account exists or while a limited security obligation requires retention.
retention.body2: Technical logs are kept for a period proportionate to security and diagnostics. Matomo data must be configured with a limited period and reviewed regularly.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body1: You can request access, rectification, erasure, restriction or objection for applicable processing of your data.
rights.body2: You can also withdraw analytics consent on this page and, if needed, lodge a complaint with the CNIL.

thirdPartyCookies.title: Third-party cookies and Google authentication
thirdPartyCookies.body1: The website offers Google OAuth / Sign in with Google. When you use this method, Google may place or read its own cookies and similar technologies for authentication, security, fraud prevention and session maintenance.
thirdPartyCookies.body2: These third-party trackers are necessary for the Google authentication requested by the user and are not controlled by the website’s Matomo/analytics consent.
thirdPartyCookies.body3: Refusing AmusementPark optional cookies does not block authentication. However, a browser that blocks some third-party cookies may prevent or degrade Google sign-in.

clarity.title: Microsoft Clarity usage analytics
clarity.body1: The website uses Microsoft Clarity, project x7ca53dep2, to understand how public pages are used through aggregated usage analytics, heatmaps and session replay features.
clarity.body2: Clarity may collect interactions such as clicks, scrolling, mouse movements, page rendering information, navigation context, device type and technical browser data. Private profile content must not be intentionally sent as analytics content.
clarity.body3: Clarity is activated only after consent to optional cookies. The site sends the Clarity Consent API v2 signal so analytics storage is granted or denied according to your choice; you can withdraw that consent on this page.
